name: nz-post-tracking-helper
description: Tracks NZ Post / CourierPost parcels from your tracking numbers and drafts returns labels and missing-parcel claims.
longDescription: You give the skill tracking numbers and screenshots of confirmation emails; it produces a clean status board, predicts likely delivery windows from carrier history, and drafts the wording for a missing-parcel claim or a returns shipment to the original sender. Does not contact NZ Post — you submit any claim through their portal yourself.
